mapper.select: SELECT pm.*, u.employee_no, u.real_name, u.phone FROM project_members pm JOIN users u ON pm.user_id = u.id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY pm.joined_at DESC
SELECT pm.*, u.employee_no, u.real_name, u.phone FROM project_members pm JOIN users u ON pm.user_id = u.id WHERE pm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pm.joined_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_members (project_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{role}, COALESCE(#{joinedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
